expectedScope: Add JitsiMeetProvider and JitsiMeetingTemplate as etcd resource kinds.
Add JitsiMeeting and JitsiRecording as postgres resource kinds.
Add chart CRDs and package exports for the new Jitsi resource and controller surfaces.
Implement jitsi-meeting-controller.js with validate, createRoom, endRoom, generateParticipantJwt, reconcile, listActiveMeetings, getMeetingStats, startRecording, and stopRecording.
Implement jitsi-sync-controller.js following the external sync-controller pattern for Jitsi room, participant, recording, and watermark sync.
Implement jitsi-agent-bridge.js with meeting capability checks, meeting context preparation, sidecar spec creation, and agent join/leave handling.
Add /api/orgs/[org]/jitsi/webhooks/ingest with HMAC signature validation, delivery deduplication, and event delegation.
Emit meeting-created, participant-joined, participant-left, recording-started, and agent-joined-meeting through the existing event bus.
Keep Jitsi Helm deployment work in #623, web-console management UX in #625, and deeper agent meeting runtime work in #627.
qualityGates: Phase 0 reuse audit rendered before implementation planning.
Acceptance and unit tests authored before production code.
Resource model, controller, sync/webhook, agent bridge, route, event, and export coverage verified.
Webhook security negative tests cover missing, malformed, invalid, and replayed signatures.
Non-meeting agent dispatch behavior has a regression guard.
Focused Krate tests plus broader build/sdk/metadata checks are run or exact blockers are documented.
Final agent review compares the issue and Jitsi specs directly to the git diff and verification output before delivery.
